title: Looking for a Growth Stock? 3 Reasons Why Eversource (ES) is a Solid Choice
text: Eversource (ES) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

title: Down 9.6% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why You Should You Buy the Dip in Eversource (ES)
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for Eversource (ES) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.
